heading: Extension of price support on long staple cotton seeds and products
label: 1432 Extension of price support on long staple cotton seeds and products
text: Any price support program in effect on cottonseed or any of its products shall be extended to the same seed and products of the cottons defined under .section 1347(a) of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , .Section 1347 of this titlePub. L. 98–88, § 297 Stat. 494Aug. 26, 1983
